case_title: BANK OF AMERICA VS. JESSICA FISHER et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FISHER, JESSICA $1,605.00 PRINCIPAL, $267.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,872.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS (AND CHANGE OF FIRM NAME FOR THE PLTF) FILED BY ATTORNEY BRACHFELD, ERICA L
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT --CAUSE OF ACTION--BREACH OF CONTRACT AS TO COMPLAINT AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS-- AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT DECLARATION OF DILIGENCE, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA SERVED MAY-26-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FISHER, JESSICA
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $267.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT FISHER, JESSICA
DECLARATION SCOTT CARNEY FILED RE: CCP 585(A) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA AS TO DEFENDANT FISHER, JESSICA DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-09-2009
